phrases.intent_en: Ask if street performers expect tips
phrases.cultural_note: It's customary to tip street performers if you stop to watch or take a photo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the nearest metro from Charles Bridge
phrases.text_local: Kde je od Karlova mostu nejbližší metro?
phrases.cultural_note: The nearest metro is on the right bank, a short walk from the Old Town bridge tower.

likely_response.local: Stanice Staroměstská, hned za křižovatkou vpravo.
likely_response.translation_en: Staroměstská station, just past the intersection on the right.

responses.english: Staroměstská station, just past the intersection on the right.
responses.french: Stanice Staroměstská, hned za křižovatkou vpravo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Astronomical Clock tower ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladna na věž orloje?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket office is inside the Old Town Hall building, not directly on the square.

likely_response.local: V přízemí radnice, vlevo od vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor of the town hall, left of the entrance.

responses.english: On the ground floor of the town hall, left of the entrance.
responses.french: V přízemí radnice, vlevo od vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to split the bill at a restaurant
phrases.cultural_note: Splitting the bill is common, but always ask first as some smaller pubs may not do it.

likely_response.local: Ano, řekněte mi částku pro každého.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, tell me the amount for each person.

responses.english: Yes, tell me the amount for each person.
responses.french: Ano, řekněte mi částku pro každého.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Týn Church opens for visitors
phrases.text_local: Kdy se otevírá Týnský chrám pro návštěvníky?
phrases.cultural_note: Týn Church often has restricted visiting hours around mass and other services.

likely_response.local: Otevíráme v deset, ale jen odpoledne.
likely_response.translation_en: We open at ten, but only in the afternoon.

responses.english: We open at ten, but only in the afternoon.
responses.french: Otevíráme v deset, ale jen odpoledne.
